summary: CoinGlass API integration testing completed successfully. All 24 backend tests pass, verifying Open Interest, Funding Rate, and Liquidity endpoints return real CoinGlass data. Frontend displays correct data sources in all cards.
passed_tests: /api/open-interest returns real CoinGlass data with total_oi ($47.45B), change percentages (1h/4h/24h), trend (stable), exchanges distribution, and data_source='CoinGlass'
/api/funding-rate returns CoinGlass-derived data with sentiment analysis, data_source='CoinGlass (Liquidation-derived)'
/api/liquidity returns Kraken order book data with clusters, direction, and data_source='Kraken OrderBook'
Dashboard displays Open Interest card with $47.27B and 'CoinGlass' source header
Dashboard displays Funding Rate card with 'CoinGlass (Liquidation-derived)' source header
Liquidity page shows 'Kraken OrderBook' as data source in card header
/api/market/status returns Kraken live data with status='LIVE'
/api/market/bias returns market analysis with next_target and analysis_text
/api/orderbook returns order book analysis from Kraken
/api/whale-alerts returns whale signals from volume analysis
Frontend navigation works correctly (Dashboard, Liquidity pages)
Live price updates displayed correctly ($70,038.40 via Kraken)
Exchange distribution charts render correctly in Open Interest card
Liquidity clusters display correctly with above/below zones
context_for_next_testing_agent: CoinGlass API integration for Open Interest and Funding Rate (liquidation-derived) is fully functional. All endpoints use real data. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_coinglass_integration.py covers all CoinGlass and Kraken data endpoints.
